Localization.Description: Persistence by Winlogon component settings modifying

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Persistence by modifying the value of the Winlogon registry key to {object.value} via process {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
Persistence by user {subject.account.name} by modifying the value of the Winlogon registry key to {object.value} via process {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
